Hyprland 的配置文件 `hyprland.conf` 存放于 `~/.config/hypr/` 目录下，我们可以通过修改其默认配置文件来完成我们的配置。

# 01 移除警告

Hyprland 使用默认配置的时候，会在顶部展示警告信息，我们可以通过注释掉默认配置中的 : 

```conf
# autogenerated = 1 # remove this line to remove the warning
```

来移除警告。 Hyprland 的配置文件与 Python 一致，可以通过 `#` 来注释。

# 02 屏幕配置

我们可以在 `hyprland.conf` 中配置显示器，如 **分辨率** ， **刷新率** ， **位置** 以及 **缩放倍数** 。

显示器的配置有如下的形式 : 

```conf
monitor = name, resolution, position, scale
```

其中，显示器的名字，可使用的分辨率以及刷新率可以通过 `xrandr` 来查看，若无，则通过如下命令安装 :

```bash
sudo pacman -S xorg-xrandr
```


我们可以通过如下配置来设置笔记本的屏幕显示 : 

```conf
# ----------------------------------------------------#
# Monitors											  #
# ----------------------------------------------------#
# See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Monitors/

# monitor = name, resolution@refresh, position, scale
monitor = eDP-1, 2560x1440@40, auto, 1.25
# monitor = eDP-1, 1920x1080@40, auto, 1
```

上面的命令将 `eDP-1` 放置在 `0x0` 的位置，以 `2560x1440` 的分辨率和 `40Hz` 的刷新率来显示图像，屏幕的缩放倍数为 `1.25` 。

若我们将 `name` 留空，则该配置为没有其他匹配名字的配置下的默认配置，适用于所有的屏幕。

此外，我们也可以用 `preferred` 来代替分辨率和刷新率，使用推荐配置，用 `auto` 来代替 `position` ，让 Hyprland 自动帮我们安排显示器的位置 : 

```conf
monitor = , preferred, auto, 1
```

# 03 环境变量

我们可以在 `hyprland.conf` 中设置环境变量，十分简便 : 

```conf
# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Some default env vars.							  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
# See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Environment-variables/

env = HYPRCURSOR_THEME, Bibata-Modern-Ice
env = HYPRCURSOR_SIZE, 24
env = XCURSOR_SIZE,24
env = XCURSOR_THEME, Bibata-Modern-Ice

env = GDK_BACKEND,wayland
env = QT_QPA_PLATFORM,wayland;xcb
env = SDL_VIDEODRIVER,wayland

env = XDG_SESSION_TYPE,wayland
env = XDG_SESSION_DESKTOP,Hyprland
env = XDG_CURRENT_DESKTOP,Hyprland

env = QT_AUTO_SCREEN_SCALE_FACTOR, 1

env = GTK_IM_MODULE,fcitx5
env = QT_IM_MODULE,fcitx5
env = XMODIFIERS,@im,fcitx5
env = INPUT_METHOD,fcitx5

env = QT_QPA_PLATFORMTHEME,qt6ct # change to qt6ct if you have that
# env = GDK_SCALE, 2 # scale the gdk applications by only integer scalar
# env = MOZ_ENABLE_WAYLAND, 1

source = ./configs/nvidia.conf
```

## 3.1 Toolkit Backend Variables

- `env = GDK_BACKEND,wayland,x11,*` - 使用 wayland 作为 GTK 的后端，如果没有，则使用 x11 或其他的后端
- `env = QT_QPA_PLATFORM,wayland;xcb` - 使用 wayland 作为 Qt 的后端，如果没有，则回到 x11
- `env = SDL_VIDEODRIVER,wayland` - Run SDL2 applications on Wayland. Remove or set to x11 if games that provide older versions of SDL cause compatibility issues 
- `env = CLUTTER_BACKEND,wayland` - Clutter package already has wayland enabled, this variable will force Clutter applications to try and use the Wayland backend

## 3.2 XDG Specifications

- `env = XDG_CURRENT_DESKTOP,Hyprland`
- `env = XDG_SESSION_TYPE,wayland`
- `env = XDG_SESSION_DESKTOP,Hyprland` 

## 3.3 Qt Variables

- `env = QT_AUTO_SCREEN_SCALE_FACTOR,1` - [(From the Qt documentation)](https://doc.qt.io/qt-5/highdpi.html) 基于当前显示器的分辨率启用 Qt 应用程序的自动缩放
- `env = QT_QPA_PLATFORM,wayland;xcb` - Tell Qt applications to use the Wayland backend, and fall back to x11 if Wayland is unavailable
- `env = QT_WAYLAND_DISABLE_WINDOWDECORATION,1` - 在 Qt 应用程序上禁用窗口装饰
- `env = QT_QPA_PLATFORMTHEME,qt5ct` - Tells Qt based applications to pick your theme from qt5ct, use with Kvantum.

## 3.4 Theming Related Variables

- `GTK_THEME` - 设置 GTK 应用程序的主题，避免使用 `lxappearence` 或 `nwg-look` 等工具的设置
- `XCURSOR_THEME` - 设置鼠标的主题，需要已经安装过的鼠标，最好安装在 `~/.local/share/icons`
- `XCURSOR_SIZE` - 设置鼠标的大小，See [here](https://wiki.hyprland.org/FAQ/) for why you might want this variable set.

## 3.5 NVIDIA Specific

Hyprland 的配置文件允许我们分多个文件编写，最后通过 `source` 来加载其他文件中的配置，我们这里选择将 NVIDIA 的环境变量的配置单独存放于 `./configs/nvidia.conf` 中(与 `hyprland.conf` 同级的目录下) : 

```conf
env = LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME,nvidia
env = __GLX_VENDOR_LIBRARY_NAME,nvidia
env = NVD_BACKEND,direct
```

> 详细的 NVIDIA 配置可见 [官方文档](https://wiki.hyprland.org/Nvidia/) ，这里不作详细说明。

在完成配置后，我们只需要在 `hyprland.conf` 主文件中使用 : 

```conf
source = ./configs/nvidia.conf
```

将配置加载即可。

# 04 Hyprland 主体配置

我们可以配置 Hyprland 的 **外观** ， **样式** ， 以及一些 **硬件** 的设置。主要分为 : 

- 基本规则
- 窗口规则
- 启动程序
- 快捷绑定

其中，我们会在 `hyprland.conf` 中完成外观样式及一部分(必要且最小)的窗口规则，启动程序及快捷绑定的配置，其余的配置将分别写于不同的文件，方便管理。

## 4.1 基本规则

我们将在 `hyprland.conf` 中完成所有的基本规则的配置，其配置如下所示 : 

[overfold]

```conf
# --------------------------------------------------- #
# hyprland styles settings							  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
# For all categories, see https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Variables/

input {
    kb_layout = us
    kb_variant =
    kb_model =
    kb_options =
    kb_rules =
    follow_mouse = 1
    touchpad {
        natural_scroll = true
    }
    sensitivity = 0 # -1.0 - 1.0, 0 means no modification.
    numlock_by_default = true
}

general {
    # See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Variables/ for more
    gaps_in = 2
    gaps_out = 10
    border_size = 2
    #col.active_border = rgba(33ccffee) rgba(00ff99ee) 45deg
    col.active_border = rgba(cdd6f499)
    col.inactive_border = rgba(595959aa)
    layout = dwindle
    # Please see https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Tearing/ before you turn this on

    allow_tearing = false
	resize_on_border = true

}

decoration {

    # See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Variables/ for more
    rounding = 10
    blur {
        enabled = false
        size = 3
        passes = 1
    }
	shadow {
		enabled = false
		range = 4
		render_power = 3
		color = rgba(1a1a1aee)
	}
}

animations {
    enabled = yes
    # Some default animations, see https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Animations/ for more
    bezier = myBezier, 0.05, 0.9, 0.1, 1.05
	bezier = boundingback, 0.38, 0.44, 0.32, 1.1
    animation = windows, 1, 7, myBezier
    animation = windowsOut, 1, 7, default, popin 80%
    # animation = border, 1, 10, default
    # animation = borderangle, 1, 8, default
    animation = fade, 1, 7, default
    animation = workspaces, 1, 5, myBezier
    animation = specialWorkspace, 1, 5, myBezier, slidevert
}

dwindle {
    # See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Dwindle-Layout/ for more
    pseudotile = yes # master switch for pseudotiling. Enabling is bound to mainMod + P in the keybinds section below
    preserve_split = yes # you probably want this
}

master {
    # See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Master-Layout/ for more
    new_status = master
}

gestures {
    # See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Variables/ for more
    workspace_swipe = true
    workspace_swipe_fingers = 3

}

debug {
	disable_logs = false
}

misc {
    # See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Variables/ for more
    force_default_wallpaper = 0 # Set to 0 or 1 to disable the anime mascot wallpapers
    disable_hyprland_logo = true
    vfr = true
}

xwayland {
	force_zero_scaling = true
}

# Example per-device config
# See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Keywords/#executing for more
device {
	name = epic-mouse-v1
    sensitivity = -0.5
}
```

### 4.1.1 输入

Hyprland 的输入设置在 `input` 结构下，主要用于配置键盘的布局，跟随鼠标，键盘锁等 : 

```conf
input {
	kb_layout = us
	follow_mouse = 1
	touchpad {
		natural_scroll = true
	}
	sensitivity = 0    # from -1.0 to 1.0 ，设置灵敏度及加速，0 表示不更改
	numlock_by_default = true
}
```

### 4.1.2 基本样式

Hyprland 用于配置窗口基本样式的设置在 `general` 结构下，可以设置窗口间隔，边框，边框颜色，窗口布局等等 : 

```conf
general {
    # See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Variables/ for more
    gaps_in = 2        # 窗口与窗口之间的间隔
    gaps_out = 10      # 窗口与屏幕边缘的间隔
    border_size = 2    # 窗口边框的大小
    #col.active_border = rgba(33ccffee) rgba(00ff99ee) 45deg
    col.active_border = rgba(cdd6f499)     # 活动窗口边框的颜色
    col.inactive_border = rgba(595959aa)   # 非活动窗口边框的颜色
    layout = dwindle   # 窗口的布局，如何安排新建的窗口
    # Please see https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Tearing/ before you turn this on

    allow_tearing = false      # 是否允许窗口撕裂
	resize_on_border = true    # 是否允许拖动边框来调整窗口的大小
}
```

### 4.1.3 装饰

Hyprland 中用于配置窗口装饰的设置在 `decoration` 结构下，可以设置模糊及阴影 : 

```conf
decoration {
    # See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Variables/ for more
    rounding = 10
    blur {
        enabled = false
        size = 3
        passes = 1
    }
    
	shadow {
		enabled = false
		range = 4
		render_power = 3
		color = rgba(1a1a1aee)
	}
}
```

### 4.1.4 动画

Hyprland 中用于配置动画的设置在 `animation` 结构下，可以自定义动画曲线并设置特定动作的动画 : 

```conf
animations {
    enabled = yes    # 启用动画
    # Some default animations, see https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Animations/ for more
    bezier = myBezier, 0.05, 0.9, 0.1, 1.05            # 自定义的贝塞尔曲线
	bezier = boundingback, 0.38, 0.44, 0.32, 1.1
    animation = windows, 1, 7, myBezier                # 打开窗口时的动画
    animation = windowsOut, 1, 7, default, popin 80%   # 关闭窗口时的动画
    # animation = border, 1, 10, default
    # animation = borderangle, 1, 8, default
    animation = fade, 1, 7, default                    # 虚化时的动画
    animation = workspaces, 1, 5, myBezier             # 切换工作区的动画
    animation = specialWorkspace, 1, 5, myBezier, slidevert    # 打开特殊工作区的动画
}
```

### 4.1.5 杂项

在 Hyprland 中还有一些比较重要的杂项需要我们自己配置 : 

```conf
dwindle {
    # See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Dwindle-Layout/ for more
    pseudotile = yes # master switch for pseudotiling. Enabling is bound to mainMod + P in the keybinds section below
    preserve_split = yes # you probably want this
}

master {
    # See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Master-Layout/ for more
    new_status = master
}

gestures {
    # See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Variables/ for more
    workspace_swipe = true          # 允许使用触摸板滑动来切换工作区
    workspace_swipe_fingers = 3     # 使用三指滑动来切换工作区

}

debug {
	disable_logs = false
}

misc {
    # See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Variables/ for more
    force_default_wallpaper = 0 # Set to 0 or 1 to disable the anime mascot wallpapers
    disable_hyprland_logo = true
    vfr = true      # 该选项会自动调整显示的帧率，在无事发生时减少帧的发送
}

xwayland {
	force_zero_scaling = true    # 禁用 xwayland 的自动缩放，否则字体会变得很模糊
}

# Example per-device config
# See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Keywords/#executing for more
device {
	name = epic-mouse-v1
    sensitivity = -0.5
}
```

## 4.2 窗口规则

我们通过 `windowrulev2` 来设置窗口的规则 : 

```conf
# --------------------------------------------------- #
# windows rule										  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Example windowrule v1
#windowrule = opacity, 0.8, 0.7, ^(kitty)$
# windowrule = float, ^(kitty)$

# Example windowrule v2
# windowrulev2 = float,class:^(kitty)$,title:^(kitty)$
# See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Window-Rules/ for more

windowrulev2 = suppressevent maximize, class:.* # You'll probably like this.
# 将所有的窗口都最大化，保证平铺正常运行
source = ~/.config/hypr/configs/windowrules.conf
```

我们将在 `./configs/windowrules.conf` 中配置其他窗口的规则 : 

[overfold]

```conf
windowrulev2 = float, class:^(QQ)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(QQ)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(wechat)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(wechat)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(org.pulseaudio.pavucontrol)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(org.pulseaudio.pavucontrol)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(blueman-manager)$
windowrulev2 = float, class:^(nm-connection-editor)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^([Bb]top)$
windowrulev2 = float, title:^([Bb]top)$

windowrulev2 = float, title:^(ranger)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(vlc)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(vlc)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(mpv)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(mpv)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(qmmp)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(qmmp)$

windowrule = float, title:musikcube
windowrule = center, title:musikcube

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(org.kde.dolphin)$
windowrulev2 = float, class:^(org.kde.ark)$
windowrulev2 = float, class:^(org.gnome.Nautilus)
windowrulev2 = float, class:^(cmake-gui)$
windowrulev2 = float, class:^(Watt Toolkit)$
windowrulev2 = noanim, class:^(wofi)$
windowrulev2 = opacity 0.85 0.8, class:^(wofi)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(feh)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(feh)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(clash-verge)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(clash-verge)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(tlpui)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(tlpui)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(nwg-look)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(nwg-look)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(Lxappearance)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(Lxappearance)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(qt6ct)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(qt6ct)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(qt5ct)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(qt5ct)$

windowrulev2 = float, class:^(kvantummanager)$
windowrulev2 = center, class:^(kvantummanager)$
```

## 4.3 启动程序

为了能让系统正常运行，我们需要设置一部分程序在 Hyprland 启动时运行 : 

```conf
# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Execute your favorite apps at launch				  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
# exec-once = waybar & hyprpaper & firefox

exec-once = ./scripts/xdg-portal-hyprland.sh   # 如前文所说的将xpdh作为一个脚本来执行
exec-once = echo "Xft.dpi: 120" | xrdb -merge  # 设置像素的 dpi，用于缩放 xwayland 窗口
exec-once = hyprsunset -t 6000                 # 设置色调
exec-once = brightnessctl set 480              # 设置亮度

# exec-once = ~/.config/hypr/scripts/xrdb-set.sh
# exec-once = hyprpm reload

# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Source a file (multi-file configs)				  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
source = ./configs/startup_apps.conf           # 其他自启动项
```

我们将在 `./configs/startup_apps.conf` 中启动其他的程序 : 

[overfold]

```conf
$wallpaperdir = ~/.config/wallpapers

# --------------------------------------------------- #
# the wallpaper  									  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
exec-once = swww-daemon


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# polkit 											  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
# exec-once = /usr/lib/polkit-kde-authentication-agent-1
# exec-once = /usr/lib/hyprpolkitagent
exec-once = /usr/lib/polkit-gnome/polkit-gnome-authentication-agent-1


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# clipboard manager 								  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
exec-once = wl-paste --type text --watch cliphist store
exec-once = wl-paste --type image --watch cliphist store
# run "cliphist wipe" to clear the database


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# input method   									  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
exec-once = fcitx5
exec-once = ~/.config/hypr/scripts/fcitx5.sh


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# utils 											  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
exec-once = nm-applet --indicator

exec-once = bluetoothctl power off
exec-once = blueman-applet

exec-once = swaync
exec-once = waybar


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# the xdg portal and the xrdb resource    			  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
# exec-once = ~/.config/hypr/xrdb-set.sh
# exec-once = ~/.config/hypr/xdg-portal-hyprland.sh
```

其中，我们将一些脚本放在 `./scripts/` 中，如 `xdg-portal-hyprland.sh` , `fcitx5.sh` 等。 `xdg-portal-hyprland.sh` 如 [2.1.4 XDG-Desktop-Portal](01%20安装Hyprland.md#2.1.4%20XDG-Desktop-Portal) 中所示，而 `fcitx5.sh` 则为 : 

```bash
#!/usr/bin/bash

sleep 1
killall fcitx5-plasma-theme-generator
```

主要是为了减少不必要的资源占用。

## 4.4 快捷绑定

快捷键的绑定是整个 Hyprland 配置中最核心的部分，使用得流不流畅，顺不顺手，全看快捷键配置得合不合理。我们仍然在 `hyprland.conf` 中配置最主要的快捷键，而在 `./configs/keybind.conf` 中完成其他的配置 : 

```conf
# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Set programs that you use							  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
$terminal = kitty
$clipboard = cliphist list | rofi -dmenu | cliphist decode | wl-copy

$screenshot = grimblast copy area
$screenshotfull = grimblast copy screen
$screenshotandedit = grimblast save area - | swappy -f -

# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Key binds											  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
# See https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Keywords/ for more

$mainMod = SUPER

# Example binds, see https://wiki.hyprland.org/Configuring/Binds/ for more

bind = $mainMod, T, exec, $terminal # launch the terminal
bind = $mainMod, C, killactive 		# kill the focused window

source = ~/.config/hypr/configs/media-bind.conf
source = ~/.config/hypr/configs/keybinds.conf
```

在 Hyprland 的配置中，我们可以定义一个变量用于替换我们需要的内容，使用 `$` 作为前缀即可定义一个变量，而快捷键绑定的用法如下 : 

```conf
bind = MODS, key, dispatcher, param
```

我们可以设定好 `$mainMod` 为 `SUPER` 按键，即 `win键` ，然后使用该模式和其他案件进行组合， `./configs/keybinds.conf` 如下所示 : 

[overfold]

```conf
$fileManager = thunar
$lock = hyprlock
$logout = wlogout --protocol layer-shell
$colorpicker = hyprpicker -a
$togglewaybar = ~/.config/hypr/scripts/toggle_waybar.sh
$gamemode = ~/.config/hypr/scripts/gamemode.sh
$color_mode = ~/.config/hypr/scripts/change_color_mode.sh
$superpowersave = ~/.config/hypr/scripts/superpowersave.sh


bind = $mainMod SHIFT, Delete, exit, 				# exit the hyprland session
# bind = $mainMod, M, exec, $logout 				# logout menu
bind = $mainMod, E, exec, $fileManager 				# launch the file manager
bind = $mainMod, F, togglefloating, 				# toggle the window to floating
bind = $mainMod, A, exec, $colorpicker				# pick the color under cursor
bind = $mainMod, V, exec, $clipboard				# launch clipboard
# bind = $mainMod, SPACE, exec, $menu				# launch the app menu
bind = $mainMod, P, pseudo, 						# dwindle
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, P, pin						# pin the floating window on the top
bind = $mainMod, J, togglesplit, 					# dwindle
bind = $mainMod, L, exec, $lock						# lock the screen
bind = $mainMod, S, exec, $screenshot				# take a screen shot
bind = , PRINT, exec, $screenshotfull				# take a screen of full screen
bind = $mainMod ALT, S, exec, $screenshotandedit	# take a screen and edit it
bind =  , F11, fullscreen							# toggle the window to fullscreen
bind = $mainMod, H, exec, $togglewaybar				# toggle the waybar on/off
bind = $mainMod ALT, G, exec, $gamemode				# switch between gamemode/normal
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, L, exec, $color_mode
bind = $mainMod SHIFT ALT, P, exec, $superpowersave


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Rofi utils										  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Notes
bind = $mainMod, N, exec, pkill rofi; ~/.config/rofi/notes/notes.sh		# open the notes

# Todo List
bind = $mainMod, D, exec, pkill rofi; ~/.config/rofi/todo/todo.sh		# open todo lists

# Power menu
bind = $mainMod, escape, exec, pkill rofi; ~/.config/rofi/powermenu/powermenu.sh # open the power menu

#screenshot
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, S, exec, pkill rofi; bash ~/.config/rofi/screenshot/screenshot.sh # open screen shot manager

# App Launcher
bind = $mainMod, SPACE, exec, pkill rofi; rofi -show drun -modi drun,window,filebrowser,run # Rofi

# Network
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, N, exec, pkill rofi; python ~/.config/rofi/network/network.py # open network manager

# Bluetooth
bind = $mainMod, B, exec, pkill rofi; ~/.config/rofi/bluetooth/bluetooth.sh # open bluetooth manager

# Calculator
bind = $mainMod, M, exec, pkill rofi; ~/.config/rofi/calc/calc.sh # open the calculator

# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Refresh the utils									  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
bind = $mainMod, R, exec, ~/.config/hypr/scripts/refresh.sh # refresh the hyprland


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Change the wallpaper								  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
bind = $mainMod ALT, T, exec, pkill rofi; ~/.config/rofi/wallpaperSelect/wallpaperSelect.sh # open wallpaper switcher with all the imgs
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, T, exec, pkill rofi; ~/.config/rofi/wallpaperSelect/wallpaperSelect_.sh # open wallpaper switcher with categorized imgs


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# group the windows                                   #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
bind = $mainMod, G, togglegroup						# toggle the window to be group
bind = $mainMod CTRL, H, changegroupactive, b		# group backward
bind = $mainMod CTRL, L, changegroupactive, f		# group forward


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Move the window with arrow keys                     #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, left, movewindow, l			# move window left
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, right, movewindow, r		    # move window right
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, up, movewindow, u            # move window up
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, down, movewindow, d          # move window down


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Move focus with mainMod + arrow keys 				  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
bind = $mainMod, left, movefocus, l					# move focus left
bind = $mainMod, right, movefocus, r				# move focus right
bind = $mainMod, up, movefocus, u					# move focus up
bind = $mainMod, down, movefocus, d					# move focus down


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# switch between workspaces							  #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
bind = $mainMod, TAB, workspace, previous			# switch to previous workspace


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Switch workspaces with mainMod + [0-9]              #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
bind = $mainMod, 1, workspace, 1                    # switch to workspace 1
bind = $mainMod, 2, workspace, 2					# switch to workspace 2
bind = $mainMod, 3, workspace, 3					# switch to workspace 3
bind = $mainMod, 4, workspace, 4					# switch to workspace 4
bind = $mainMod, 5, workspace, 5					# switch to workspace 5
bind = $mainMod, 6, workspace, 6					# switch to workspace 6
bind = $mainMod, 7, workspace, 7					# switch to workspace 7
bind = $mainMod, 8, workspace, 8					# switch to workspace 8
bind = $mainMod, 9, workspace, 9					# switch to workspace 9
bind = $mainMod, 0, workspace, 10					# switch to workspace 10
bind = $mainMod ALT, Down, workspace, empty 		# switch to an empty workspace


# --------------------------------------------------------------- #
# Move active window to a workspace with mainMod + SHIFT + [0-9]  #
# --------------------------------------------------------------- #
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 1, movetoworkspace, 1		 # move window to workspace 1
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 2, movetoworkspace, 2		 # move window to workspace 1
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 3, movetoworkspace, 3		 # move window to workspace 1
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 4, movetoworkspace, 4		 # move window to workspace 1
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 5, movetoworkspace, 5		 # move window to workspace 1
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 6, movetoworkspace, 6		 # move window to workspace 1
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 7, movetoworkspace, 7		 # move window to workspace 1
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 8, movetoworkspace, 8		 # move window to workspace 1
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 9, movetoworkspace, 9		 # move window to workspace 1
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, 0, movetoworkspace, 10		 # move window to workspace 1


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Move active window to a workspace silently          #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
bind = $mainMod CTRL, 1, movetoworkspacesilent, 1 	# move window to workspace 1 silently
bind = $mainMod CTRL, 2, movetoworkspacesilent, 2 	# move window to workspace 2 silently
bind = $mainMod CTRL, 3, movetoworkspacesilent, 3 	# move window to workspace 3 silently
bind = $mainMod CTRL, 4, movetoworkspacesilent, 4 	# move window to workspace 4 silently
bind = $mainMod CTRL, 5, movetoworkspacesilent, 5 	# move window to workspace 5 silently
bind = $mainMod CTRL, 6, movetoworkspacesilent, 6 	# move window to workspace 6 silently
bind = $mainMod CTRL, 7, movetoworkspacesilent, 7 	# move window to workspace 7 silently
bind = $mainMod CTRL, 8, movetoworkspacesilent, 8 	# move window to workspace 8 silently
bind = $mainMod CTRL, 9, movetoworkspacesilent, 9 	# move window to workspace 9 silently
bind = $mainMod CTRL, 0, movetoworkspacesilent, 10 	# move window to workspace 10 silently


# --------------------------------------------------- #
# Example special workspace (scratchpad)		      #
# --------------------------------------------------- #
bind = $mainMod, W, togglespecialworkspace, magic				# toggle magic workspace
bind = $mainMod SHIFT, W, movetoworkspace, special:magic		# move window to magic workspace
bind = $mainMod CTRL, W, movetoworkspacesilent, special:magic	# move window to magic workspae silently


# -------------------------------------------------------- #
# Scroll through existing workspaces with mainMod + scroll #
# -------------------------------------------------------- #
bind = $mainMod, mouse_down, workspace, e-1		# next workspace
bind = $mainMod, mouse_up, workspace, e+1		# previous workspace


# -------------------------------------------------------- #
# Move/resize windows with mainMod + LMB/RMB and dragging  #
# -------------------------------------------------------- #
bindm = $mainMod, mouse:272, movewindow				# move window
bindm = $mainMod, mouse:273, resizewindow			# resize window
binde = $mainMod ALT, Right, resizeactive, 30 0		# resize window
binde = $mainMod ALT, Left, resizeactive, -30 0		# resize window
binde = $mainMod ALT, Up, resizeactive, 0 -30		# resize window
binde = $mainMod ALT, Down, resizeactive, 0 30		# resize window

```

在上面，我们可以看到我们将大量的脚本绑定在某一快捷键上，这是 Hyprland 的特色，更是 Linux 区别于 Windows 的特色之一。在后面，我们会讲讲这些脚本的作用，以及优化 Hyprland 的使用体验。

# 05 终端

我们使用 `kitty` 作为终端模拟器，并使用 `fish` 作为我们的 Shell，具体配置可见 [03 终端](03%20终端.md) 。

# 06 Status Bar

我们使用 `waybar` 作为我们的状态栏，但是默认下的 `waybar` 丑得可以，不过凭借我们的码力，我们能够将其美化的超级好看，具体的配置见 [04 waybar](04%20waybar.md) 。

# 07 Notification Daemon

我们使用 `swaync` 作为通知守护进程，默认下的配置就可以，但是总免不了折腾，具体的配置可以见 [05 Swaync](05%20Swaync.md) 。

# 08 使用优化

我们上面在配置 Hyprland 的快捷键的时候已经看到，我们用了大量的脚本来进行我们的日常操作。其中，我们基于 `rofi` 实现了最多日常使用的功能，如 : 

- App Launcher
- Clipboard Manager
- Bluetooth Manager
- Network Manager
- Screenshot Manager
- Calculator
- Todo List
- Notes
- Wallpaper Selector
- Power Menu

使用 `rofi` 来代替这些日常进程能够进一步减少系统资源的占用，特别是减少了蓝牙，网络，截图工具，剪切板等 GUI 应用的使用。

我们在 `~/.config/rofi` 目录下存放我们的脚本及 rofi 样式，具体的配置可见 [Rofi](Rofi.md) 。
